REAPER.title: Reaper
REAPER.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage to ALL enemies.
Unblocked damage heals you.
CORE_SURGE.title: Core Surge
CONCENTRATE.title: Concentrate
HEATSINK.title: Heatsink
HEATSINK.description:
Whenever you play a Power card,
draw [blue]{Cards:diff()}[/blue] cards.
LIMIT_BREAK.title: Limit Break
CATALYST.title: Catalyst
HEAVY_BLADE.title: Heavy Blade
HEAVY_BLADE.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage.
[gold]Strength[/gold] affects this card {Energy:diff()} times.
ELECTRODYNAMICS.title: Electrodynamics
ELECTRODYNAMICS.description:
Channel {LightingBall} [gold]Lightning[/gold] Orbs.
[gold]Lightning[/gold] Orbs hit ALL enemies.
BERSERK.title: Berserk
BERSERK.description:
Gain {Binbong} [gold]Vulnerable[/gold].
At the start of your turn, gain {Energy:energyIcons()}.
SELF_REPAIR.title: Self Repair
SELF_REPAIR.description: At the end of combat, heal {Heal:diff()} HP.
TERROR.title: Terror
SEARING_BLOW.title: Searing Blow
SEARING_BLOW.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage.
Can be upgraded any number of times.
